title: tontelea macrophylla
intro: Tontelea macrophylla is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Tontelea macrophylla include the reduction of fever, relief from respiratory issues, and the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
